name: COSORI Air Fryer 6L Dual Zone DC Motor
pros: 6L capacity handles family meals or meal prep—rare in Japan's compact kitchens
DC motor technology runs quieter and more efficiently than standard AC motors
App control via Vesync (English-compatible) lets you manage cooking remotely
cons: Takes up significant counter space—problematic in typical Tokyo apartments
¥19,980 is premium pricing; you're paying for smart features many won't use
shortDescription: Smart 6L air fryer with DC motor efficiency and app control.
review: COSORI's 6L model is a standout for expats who cook Western comfort food and meal-prep regularly. The DC motor is genuinely quieter than competitors, and the app works seamlessly for foreigners. The catch: it's chunky. Unless you have proper counter space or are willing to store it, a standard 3-4L model may serve you better. Strong build quality at a premium price.
